## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new team members and provide an overview of GrowthX's current service offerings and use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is experiencing rapid growth, with 5 new team members starting this week](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Core offerings include editorial content (50-100k words/mo), programmatic SEO, link building, and outbound campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [The company is focused on refining and scaling existing services while exploring new potential offerings](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows are a key differentiator, enabling high-volume, quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Kyle Gaudreau: Lead of client services, joined in October, extensive growth & agency background](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Jimmy Pal: 2nd employee, initially focused on SEO, now diversifying into link building & outbound](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Dave Capone: SEO veteran (20+ years), joined yesterday, experience in e-commerce & editorial](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Ericksson Abad: Finance & operations manager, background in FinTech SaaS](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Sydney Go: Managing editor, experience in content creation, editing, and SEO tools](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Marília Caroline da Silva: Founding member of recruitment team, 5 years in IT recruitment](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Felipe Lima: Tech background (Airbnb, Stripe), connection to co-founder Danielle](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)

### Current Service Offerings

  - [Editorial Content (Base offering):](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
      - [50-100k words/month](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
      - [7-15 pieces/week (1500-2000 words each)](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Managing editors own strategy & quality](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
      - [Account managers refine AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
      - [Freelance writers for editing & expansion](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO:](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
      - [Creates repeatable templates for scaled content](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
      - [Based on pages/year, needs refinement in process](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
      - [Potential for auto-publishing via APIs (future development)](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [Link Building & Content Collaboration:](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
      - [Started in January](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
      - [Orchestrates backlink exchanges among clients](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
      - [Transitions to paid backlinks after 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Outbound Campaigns:](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
      - [Smaller portion of business (8-10%)](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
      - [Challenges with scalability and platform restrictions](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)

### Future Opportunities

  - [Content repurposing (e.g., webinars to blogs)](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Long-form interview-based content (case studies)](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [Expanding services for existing clients (e.g., Galileo)](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Exploring new use cases and growth paths](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)

### Process & Workflow

  - [AI-powered workflows enable high-volume content production](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Human loop for quality control and refinement](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Iterative approach to improve AI outputs based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Balance between automation and human touch for optimal quality](https://fathom.video/share/zNYA5dZFJq65-xxdKMdW5yLRqjfGQcyq?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
